name: Job Application CRM v2 - Formatted Notifications

filters.q: in:inbox -from:me -subject:"New Job Application Added" -subject:"Job Application Status Updated" -subject:"📌 New Job Application Logged" -subject:"🔄 Job Application Status Updated"

parameters.text:
=You are an email classifier and structured-data extractor for Ronald Amancio's job application tracker.

Determine whether this email clearly concerns a job application Ronald already submitted.

QUALIFY:
- application confirmation or acknowledgement
- application status update
- recruiter follow-up about an existing application
- assessment or coding-test request
- interview invitation or confirmed interview schedule
- shortlisting notice
- request for additional application information
- rejection notice
- offer, hiring, or onboarding notice

DO NOT QUALIFY:
- job alerts, recommended jobs, suggested positions
- newsletters, marketing, advertisements
- cold recruiter outreach without evidence of an existing application
- invitations asking Ronald to apply
- account verification, password reset, security alert
- unrelated automated notifications, personal email, spam

Important:
- There must be clear evidence of an existing submitted application.
- Never invent missing values; leave unavailable text fields blank.
- Identify the originating job board when obvious.
- For direct company/recruiter messages with no platform, use "Direct Recruiter".
- Do not treat an ATS or assessment provider as the employer unless the email says it is.
- Extract salary and job-posted date only when explicitly present.
- For a clear application confirmation, use the received date as dateApplied if no other date is stated.
- Dates must be YYYY-MM-DD.

applicationStatus must be exactly one of:
Applied, Application Received, Under Review, Recruiter Contacted, Assessment Requested, Interview Requested, Interview Scheduled, Shortlisted, Additional Information Requested, Rejected, Withdrawn, Offer Received, Hired, Unknown.

CONFIDENCE:
The score represents confidence in your classification. Clear application confirmation/interview/rejection/job alert/newsletter: usually 0.95-1.00. Ambiguous recruiter message: around 0.50-0.74. Never return 0 unless the email is missing or unreadable.

Return only the required structured output.

EMAIL
Sender name: {{ $json.senderName }}
Sender email: {{ $json.senderEmail }}
Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Received date: {{ $json.receivedDate }}
Gmail message ID: {{ $json.messageId }}
Body:
{{ $json.cleanedEmailBody }}

parameters.inputSchema: {"type": "object", "properties": {"isJobApplicationEmail": {"type": "boolean"}, "confidence": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0, "maximum": 1}, "jobBoard": {"type": "string"}, "companyName": {"type": "string"}, "jobTitle": {"type": "string"}, "jobDescription": {"type": "string"}, "salaryOffered": {"type": "string"}, "jobDatePosted": {"type": "string"}, "dateApplied": {"type": "string"}, "applicationStatus": {"type": "string", "enum": ["Applied", "Application Received", "Under Review", "Recruiter Contacted", "Assessment Requested", "Interview Requested", "Interview Scheduled", "Shortlisted", "Additional Information Requested", "Rejected", "Withdrawn", "Offer Received", "Hired", "Unknown"]}, "recruiterName": {"type": "string"}, "recruiterEmail": {"type": "string"}, "applicationUrl": {"type": "string"}, "reason": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["isJobApplicationEmail", "confidence", "jobBoard", "companyName", "jobTitle", "jobDescription", "salaryOffered", "jobDatePosted", "dateApplied", "applicationStatus", "recruiterName", "recruiterEmail", "applicationUrl", "reason"], "additionalProperties": false}

parameters.subject: 📌 New Job Application Logged
parameters.message:
=

📌 New Job Application Logged

Your Google Sheets tracker was updated successfully.

Company{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.companyName || 'Not identified' }}
Position{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.jobTitle || 'Not identified' }}
Status{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.applicationStatus }}
Job Board{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.jobBoard || 'Direct Recruiter' }}
Recruiter{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.recruiterName || $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.recruiterEmail || 'Not available' }}
Date Applied{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.dateApplied || 'Not available' }}
Last Activity{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.lastActivityDate }}
AI Confidence{{ Math.round(($('Merge Existing Application').item.json.confidence || 0) * 100) }}%

Automated by n8n Job Application CRM.

parameters.subject: 🔄 Job Application Status Updated
parameters.message:
=

🔄 Job Application Status Updated

An existing application changed status.

Company{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.companyName }}
Position{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.jobTitle }}
Previous Status{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.previousStatus || 'Unknown' }}
New Status{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.applicationStatus }}
Recruiter{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.recruiterName || $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.recruiterEmail || 'Not available' }}
Last Activity{{ $('Merge Existing Application').item.json.lastActivityDate }}

Your Google Sheets tracker was updated automatically.

parameters.content:
## Job Application CRM v2

Spreadsheet: **My Job Application Log Files**

Worksheet: **Job Applications**

Use these headers in row 1:

Application Key
Job Board
Company Name
Job Title
Job Description
Salary Offered
Job Date Posted
Date Applied
Last Activity Date
Application Status
Recruiter Name
Recruiter Email
Application URL
Email Subject
Received Date
Last Updated
Message ID
Confidence Score

Important after importing:

1. Set the spreadsheet ID in both Google Sheets nodes.
2. Refresh the columns in **Upsert Job Application**.
3. Re-select **Application Key** as the matching column.
4. Confirm the Gmail, Google Sheets, and Groq credentials.
5. Test before publishing.

This version includes formatted HTML notifications and a Last Activity Date column.
